text.title: Solution Assessment Examples
text.summary: CRM implementation post-implementation assessment and user feedback analysis with structured interpretation.

example.code:
Solution: CRM Phase 1 Assessment Type: Post-Implementation (90 days) Assessor: Independent BA (not on delivery team)
Requirements Compliance: - 85% requirements fully met (17/20) - 10% partially met (2/20) — mobile sync and bulk export features - 5% not met (1/20) — deferred to Phase 2 (stakeholder-approved)
Business Value: | Metric | Baseline | Target | Actual | Variance | Status | |-----------------|----------|--------|--------|----------|-----------| | Lead conversion | 12% | +20% → 14.4% | 14.2% | -1.4% | On Track | | Sales cycle | 28 days | -15% → 23.8d | 24.7d | -3.8% | On Track | | Data accuracy | 78% | 95% | 97% | +2% | Exceeded |
Recommendation: Accept with remediation plan. - Mobile sync (partial): add to Phase 2 backlog within 30 days. - Sales cycle target: within -15% threshold; monitor at 120-day check.

example.note: n=50 survey respondents — always reconcile with active user count before interpreting.
example.code:
Survey Results (n=50, active user base=210, response rate=24%):
| Question | Score (1-5) | |-----------------------------|-------------| | Easy to learn | 4.2 | | Meets my work needs | 3.8 | | Performance acceptable | 3.5 | | Would recommend to colleague| 3.9 |
Caution: response rate 24% (<30% threshold) — churned users not represented. Action: pull support ticket volume for non-respondents; reconcile before declaring satisfaction scores valid.
Key themes from free-text (n=50 responses): - Performance needs improvement: mentioned 15 times → Critical issue - Missing data export to Excel: mentioned 8 times → High priority backlog - Training materials helpful: mentioned 12 times → Retain in onboarding
